creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
Created attachment 170405
log_vlc

This problem arose about a year or two ago.
IPTV normally plays at the beginning of the stream, you can switch several times to other channels and then the picture freezes and whistling sound of the channel.
Example problem in the log (see attachment).
Developers VLC still have not responded to this problem.

<pkg info>
vlc-qt4-2.2.1_9,4              Qt 4 based multimedia player and streaming server

<uname>
FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p2 amd64

<make.conf>
CPUTYPE?=core2
OPTIONS_SET=CUPS
WITHOUT_LPR=YES
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=apache=2.4
QT4_OPTIONS=CUPS NAS QGTKSTYLE
LOCALIZED_LANG=ru
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=perl5=5.20
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=mysql=5.7
.if ${.CURDIR:M*/ports/devel/ccache}
NO_CCACHE=yes
.endif
